Redesign plan for resource generation to improve modularity and independence from SDK and Firmware.

# Purpose
The document outlines the redesign goals for a resource generation system. The primary objectives include separating the processing of different resource types into individual files to improve modularity. It aims to ensure independence between SDK and Firmware by using parameters to manage differences, rather than explicit checks. The redesign also seeks to eliminate the use of shell commands and to store intermediate states directly in the filesystem to reduce the need for large data structures during each build. Additionally, it intends to remove dynamically generated resource content from static resource definition JSON files to enhance modularity.
